languages.text: "Я дам вам новые способы служить Богу-Императору!"
"I shall give you new ways to serve the God-Emperor!"
languages.original_text: "Я дам вам новые способы служить Богу-Императору!"

traits.locale_text: "I shall grant you new ways to serve the God-Emperor!"
"I shall grant you new ways to serve the God-Emperor!"
"I shall give you new ways to serve the God-Emperor!"
"I shall give you new ways to serve the God-Emperor!"
"I shall give you new ways to serve the God-Emperor!"

languages.text: “我将让你们以全新的方式侍奉神皇！”
languages.original_text: "I shall give you new ways to serve the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: “我将让你们以全新的方式侍奉神皇！”

languages.text: "Size Tanrı İmparator'a hizmet etmenin yeni yollarını sunacağım!"
languages.original_text: "I shall give you new ways to serve the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: "Size Tanrı İmparator'a hizmet etmenin yeni yollarını sunacağım!"

languages.text: « Je vous offrirai de nouvelles manières de servir l'Empereur-Dieu. »
languages.original_text: "I shall give you new ways to serve the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: « Je vous offrirai de nouvelles manières de servir l'Empereur-Dieu. »

languages.text: «¡Les proporcionaré nuevas formas de servir al Dios Emperador!».
languages.original_text: "I shall give you new ways to serve the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Les proporcionaré nuevas formas de servir al Dios Emperador!».

languages.text: "Ich werde Euch neue Wege geben, dem Gottimperator zu dienen!"
languages.original_text: "I shall give you new ways to serve the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde Euch neue Wege geben, dem Gottimperator zu dienen!"

languages.text: 「私は貴様らに、神帝陛下に仕える新たな道を授けよう！」
languages.original_text: "I shall give you new ways to serve the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: 「私は貴様らに、神帝陛下に仕える新たな道を授けよう！」
